delivery.instructions: Use a calm, precise technical delivery. Speak clearly, leave measured pauses between ideas, and avoid sales emphasis.

segments.narration: Agent instructions often hide decisions in dense prose. What will the agent actually do?
segments.caption: What will the agent actually do?

segments.narration: Pythonic Agent Pseudocode makes the workflow readable: a bounded loop, named checks, and an explicit result.
segments.caption: Readable workflow: bounded checks and explicit results.
segments.mute_safe_copy: Readable workflow. Bounded checks. Explicit results.

segments.narration: The linter catches an unbounded loop with APSEUDO-WHILE-001, then points toward a bounded workflow.
segments.caption: Catch ambiguity with APSEUDO-WHILE-001.
segments.mute_safe_copy: Catch ambiguity before an agent runs.

segments.narration: The same policy core reaches editor tools, MCP, the runner, hooks, pre-commit, and continuous integration.
segments.caption: One shared policy for tools, agents, hooks, and CI.
segments.mute_safe_copy: One shared policy across the delivery path.

segments.narration: Before execution, preflights and no-diff checks keep a bounded read-only task honest.
segments.caption: Guarded execution: preflights, read-only work, no diff.
segments.mute_safe_copy: Run bounded tasks with visible guardrails.

segments.narration: Behavior you can read. Work you can run. This film uses AI-generated narration.
segments.caption: Behavior you can read. Work you can run. AI-generated narration.
segments.mute_safe_copy: Behavior you can read. Work you can run. AI-generated narration.
